message:
feat(pager): add WAL mode integration + fix workspace clippy errors

Add JournalMode enum (Delete/Wal) and WalBackend trait to pager traits,
enabling the pager to commit via WAL frame append instead of rollback
journal. SimplePager now supports journal_mode/set_journal_mode/
set_wal_backend, and SimpleTransaction routes commits through either
the journal or WAL path based on the active mode. WAL-mode page reads
check the WAL backend before falling through to cache/disk.

Also fixes 2 clippy errors in replication_sender.rs (useless_let_if_seq,
items_after_statements) that were the last workspace-wide blockers.

11 new WAL-mode tests, 197 total pager tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
